economic_mechanism: Same regime-first income stack as 21D router, but longer 45-DTE credit verticals/condors reduce trade cadence and late-cycle gamma while still harvesting theta and taking 50% profits on favorable swings.
regime_envelope: bullish→PCS; bearish→CCS; neutral with iv_rank≥15→IC; else stand_aside
stand_aside_rule: Stand aside when regime is missing/unknown, neutral with low IV rank, credit/max-loss filters fail, or one-lot slot is occupied.
greek_intended: slower theta harvest; defined-risk short premium; lower cadence
greek_dangerous: gap risk over longer hold; vol expansion; IC two-sided risk
notes: Spine pilot: longer-DTE regime router. Distinct from closed 21D router family by DTE/management horizon only (materially different gamma/time profile). Proxy L0 only.
